Best India to Nepal Tour Packages – Discover the Roof of the World

Embark on a soul-stirring journey with the best India to Nepal tour packages, where ancient culture meets majestic Himalayan scenery. Whether you're planning a spiritual retreat, romantic escape, or adrenaline-fueled adventure, Travelxploria—your trusted Best International Tour Operator and best tours and travel agency in India—offers seamless and unforgettable experiences tailored for Indian travelers. All packages comply with guidelines from the Nepal Tourism Board, ensuring authentic and safe experiences for Indian visitors.

Why Visit Nepal from India?

Close Proximity and Easy Accessibility for Indian Travelers
One of the main reasons Indian tourists choose Nepal is its close proximity and convenient travel access. Whether you’re looking for a Nepal tour package from Delhi, Nepal tour packages from Kolkata, or even Hyderabad to Nepal tour packages, Travelxploria, recognized among the best international travel agents in Kolkata, ensures simple documentation, border assistance, and well-connected transfers via road or flight. Indian citizens can enter Nepal using either a valid passport or voter ID card—no visa required. Carry physical copies of IDs for hotel check-ins.

Majestic Himalayan Views and Cultural Heritage
From the stunning Annapurna range to the sacred stupas of Kathmandu, Nepal is a treasure trove of natural wonders and ancient heritage. Every traveler is captivated by serene temples, vibrant festivals, and the iconic sight of Everest piercing the clouds. For photography lovers, sunrise at Sarangkot in Pokhara or Nagarkot near Kathmandu offers some of the most Instagram-worthy views of the Himalayas.

Ideal for Pilgrimage, Adventure, and Leisure Travel
Nepal offers something for everyone. Pilgrims can visit Lumbini—the birthplace of Lord Buddha—while thrill-seekers can opt for paragliding in Pokhara or jungle safaris in Chitwan. Families and honeymooners will find serenity in peaceful hill stations and curated cultural walks. That’s why our India to Nepal adventure tour packages under budget and India to Nepal honeymoon tour packages at affordable price are among our most popular offerings.

Top India to Nepal Tour Packages

5 Days Nepal Tour Package from India – Kathmandu and Pokhara Highlights
This well-crafted package includes the best of Kathmandu and Pokhara. Stroll through the grandeur of Durbar Square, visit the Swayambhunath “Monkey Temple,” and enjoy a serene boat ride on Phewa Lake with Machapuchare reflecting in the waters. A perfect short getaway for first-timers or those seeking a mix of culture and nature. The journey between Kathmandu and Pokhara can be done by road (6–8 hours) or flight (30 minutes).

India to Nepal Honeymoon Tour Packages
Our India to Nepal honeymoon tour packages at affordable price offer romantic experiences—from candle-lit riverside dinners in Chitwan to stargazing in a private campsite near the Himalayas. Add-ons include spa treatments, sunrise mountain views in Nagarkot, and private cultural tours. Packages also include optional sunrise yoga, meditation sessions, and premium suites with Himalayan views—ideal for those searching honeymoon packages from Kolkata or other Indian cities.

Budget-Friendly Nepal Tour Packages for Indian Families
Explore affordable India to Nepal tour packages that are crafted with families in mind. Visit child-friendly attractions in Pokhara, enjoy a jungle safari in Chitwan, and learn about peace and meditation in Lumbini. These experiences create unforgettable family memories—all without straining your budget. For kids and elderly travelers, all itineraries include rest breaks and vehicle support for longer walks.

Customized Nepal Tour Itineraries from Major Indian Cities
We offer flexible itineraries whether you are looking for Nepal tour packages from Mumbai, Nepal tour package from Delhi, Nepal tour packages from Kolkata, or Hyderabad to Nepal tour packages. All our packages can be tailored based on your group size, interest, and duration. You can choose pick-up options from the India-Nepal border (Sunauli, Raxaul, Panitanki) or major Indian airports with connecting flights. Travelxploria, your best tour and travel company in India, ensures convenience every step of the way.

Popular Destinations Covered in Nepal Tour Packages

Kathmandu – Temples, Durbar Squares, and Heritage Walks
Explore the heart of Nepal at Kathmandu’s UNESCO-listed sites. From the architectural marvels of Durbar Square to the sacred Boudhanath stupa and the spiritual energy of Swayambhunath, every street corner echoes Nepal’s rich legacy. Evening aarti at Pashupatinath temple is a deeply moving experience—recommended for couples and culture lovers.

Pokhara – Lakes, Caves, and Mountain Views
Pokhara offers tranquil lakeside vibes and Himalayan adventure. Take a traditional boat across Phewa Lake, explore the Gupteshwor Cave, and hike to the World Peace Pagoda. It’s the ultimate destination for both relaxation and thrill. Paragliding, zip-lining, and cycling trails are available with certified guides. We recommend advance booking during peak season (Oct–Nov).

Lumbini – Birthplace of Lord Buddha
Walk the peaceful monastic zones of Lumbini where international temples celebrate Buddhist traditions from around the world. Meditation sessions and historical tours make this site a spiritual highlight of any Nepal itinerary. Guided walking tours are available with certified monks who offer meditation guidance in English and Hindi.

Chitwan National Park – Wildlife Safaris and Nature Trails
Embark on a wild escape with Travelxploria’s guided safaris in Chitwan. Spot one-horned rhinos, Bengal tigers, and vibrant birdlife through jeep safaris, canoe rides, and jungle walks. We recommend avoiding elephant-back rides in favor of ethical tourism options like guided jeep safaris and eco-lodges.

What’s Included in the Best India to Nepal Tour Packages?

Hotel Accommodation and Daily Breakfast
Stay in handpicked 3 to 4-star hotels with authentic Nepali charm. Daily breakfast is included with options to add lunch and dinner as per your preference. Luxury upgrades and heritage stays are available in Kathmandu and Pokhara on request.

Transfers from India-Nepal Border or Airport
Our packages include hassle-free transfers—whether you’re flying in or crossing overland from India. We serve all major entry points including Gorakhpur, Siliguri, and Sunauli. All vehicles are private, air-conditioned, and sanitized as per safety standards. Book confidently with the best travel agency for international travel.

Sightseeing Tours and Entrance Fees
Enjoy curated sightseeing with professional guides and included entry to key heritage sites like Patan Durbar Square, Swayambhunath, and Phewa Lake. Our guides are fluent in English and Hindi, and offer insights into history, architecture, and mythology.

Optional Add-ons: Paragliding, Trekking, and Cultural Shows
Enhance your trip with personalized add-ons such as Annapurna treks, paragliding experiences in Pokhara, or traditional dance performances in Kathmandu. We recommend packing trekking shoes, sunscreen, and a light jacket year-round due to elevation-based weather shifts.

Best Time to Visit Nepal from India

Spring (March to May) – Clear Views and Ideal Weather
Spring offers blooming rhododendrons, pleasant trekking weather, and clear Himalayan views. It’s one of the best seasons for honeymooners and families. Light jackets and sun protection are essential. Advance hotel bookings are recommended in Pokhara.

Autumn (September to November) – Festival Season and Trekking
Autumn brings major Nepali festivals like Dashain and Tihar, along with excellent trekking conditions. The crisp air and festive spirit make it ideal for cultural and nature-based travel. Expect high demand—book flights and permits in advance.

Seasonal Travel Tips for Budget and Comfort
Off-season travel (June–August or December–February) means lower prices and fewer tourists. However, it’s wise to check weather updates and pack accordingly. Our affordable India to Nepal tour packages are especially popular during these periods. Monsoon months may affect road travel; winter requires thermal wear for higher elevations.

Frequently Asked Questions About India to Nepal Tour Packages

Do Indian citizens need a passport or visa to enter Nepal?
No. Indian citizens can enter Nepal with a valid voter ID or passport. No visa is required. However, carrying proper ID is essential for hotel check-ins and domestic flights. Aadhar card is not accepted for cross-border travel.

What is the ideal duration for a Nepal tour from India?
A 5 to 7-day trip is perfect for covering major destinations like Kathmandu, Pokhara, and Chitwan. Longer itineraries are ideal for including treks or spiritual retreats in Lumbini. Custom itineraries are available for weekend getaways or extended 10–12 day holidays.

Can I customize my Nepal tour package to include trekking or adventure?
Yes. We offer India to Nepal adventure tour packages under budget that include guided treks, rafting, paragliding, and wildlife safaris. These experiences can be added to standard packages based on your interests. All treks are organized with licensed guides and proper permits.

Are there India to Nepal honeymoon tour packages at affordable price?
Absolutely. Our India to Nepal honeymoon tour packages at affordable price combine luxury, privacy, and romance with great value. Packages include mountain-view suites, private transfers, and romantic cultural experiences. Popular upgrades include spa sessions and Nagarkot sunrise breakfasts.

Are there affordable India to Nepal tour packages for families?
Yes, we specialize in affordable India to Nepal tour packages for families with children. These include age-appropriate sightseeing, safe transport, and comfortable accommodations across family-friendly destinations. Family discounts and multi-room bookings available on request.

Do you offer India to Nepal group or adventure tour packages under budget?
We do! Our India to Nepal adventure tour packages under budget are ideal for groups looking to trek, raft, or explore the wild side of Nepal. We offer discounts for group bookings and customizable routes. Travelers should carry a basic first-aid kit, reusable water bottle, and sturdy footwear.

How to Book the Best India to Nepal Tour Packages

Trusted Indian and Nepalese Travel Agencies
Travelxploria, a best tour and travel company, partners with top-rated tour operators in India and Nepal to deliver a seamless, end-to-end experience. From Delhi to Kathmandu, our network ensures trust and quality service. We are accredited by major travel associations and maintain 24/7 support during your tour.

Online Booking Platforms Offering Cross-Border Packages
You can book our best India to Nepal tour packages through our official website or authorized online platforms. All packages include secure payment options and real-time availability. Seasonal discounts, group offers, and last-minute deals are available—check our promotions page.
​
Travel Documents, Currency, and Health Guidelines
Indian travelers must carry a valid voter ID or passport. The local currency is Nepalese Rupee (NPR), which is widely accepted. We recommend carrying basic medicines, checking for altitude-related concerns, and ensuring mobile connectivity for safety. Local SIM cards (NCELL or NTC) are easily available at the airport with passport ID. Credit cards are accepted in major cities; carry cash in rural areas.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Kathmandu and transfer to hotel for overnight stay.
  • Visit Pashupatinath and Jal Narayan Temples; prepare for Kailash Yatra.
  • Drive to Syabrubesi and check-in at lodge.
  • Cross Nepal-China border and drive to Kerung.
  • Drive through scenic landscapes to reach Saga.
  • Travel to the sacred Lake Mansarovar with a view of Mt. Kailash.
  • Perform rituals at Lake Mansarovar and drive to Darchen.
  • Start Kailash Kora with a trek from Yama Dwar to Diraphuk.
  • Cross Dolma La Pass and trek to Zuthulphuk.
  • Complete Kora and return to Saga via Mansarovar Horchu.
  • Drive back to Kerung for overnight stay.
  • Return to Kathmandu and check-in at hotel.
  • Depart from Kathmandu for your onward journey.

During this spiritually enriching journey, you will have the opportunity to engage in various religious rituals such as Puja, Havana (fire ceremony), meditation, and take a holy bath in the lake’s sacred waters—an act believed to cleanse sins and purify the soul. Absorb the tranquil surroundings and the divine energy of this revered site. In the afternoon, proceed with a short drive to Darchen (46 km), situated at an altitude of 4600 meters. Overnight stay at a simple lodge, arranged by Travelxploria.

packages.overview:
• Arrival at Kathmandu International Airport with hotel transfer and welcome soft drink; leisure time and overnight stay in Kathmandu.
  • Breakfast followed by full-day Kathmandu sightseeing: Pashupatinath Temple, Boudhanath Stupa, Swayambhunath Stupa, and Kathmandu Durbar Square; leisure time and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast, drive to Pokhara via Manakamana Temple; welcome soft drink, leisure time, and overnight stay in Pokhara.
  • Full-day sightseeing in Pokhara covering Bindabashini Temple, Gupteshor Cave, Devi’s Fall, Seti River, Fewa Lake, and Peace Pagoda; leisure time and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast, drive to Chitwan; welcome drink, lunch, village tour, Tharu culture dance, leisure time, dinner, and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast, bird watching, elephant safari, jungle walk, canoeing; meals and overnight stay in Chitwan.
  • Breakfast, drive back to Kathmandu; welcome drink, leisure time, and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast and transfer from hotel to Kathmandu International Airport for departure.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at the hotel before embarking on a full-day sightseeing tour of Kathmandu’s most iconic landmarks. Visit the sacred Pashupatinath Temple, one of the holiest Hindu sites, followed by a trip to the magnificent Boudhanath Stupa, a revered center of Buddhist worship. Next, explore the famous Swayambhunath Stupa, also known as the Monkey Temple, which offers stunning panoramic views of the city. Conclude your cultural journey at the historic Kathmandu Durbar Square, rich with ancient architecture and heritage. After the tour, enjoy free time to relax or explore at your leisure. Overnight stay at the hotel in Kathmandu.

Begin your day with a hearty breakfast at the hotel before departing Kathmandu for Pokhara. En route, visit the sacred Manakamana Temple, accessible by a scenic cable car ride, where you can seek blessings and admire the stunning surroundings. After the temple visit, continue your journey to Pokhara, a picturesque city nestled beside serene lakes and majestic mountains, covering approximately 210 kilometers in 7 to 8 hours. packages.overview:
• Arrival in Kathmandu with airport pickup by Travelxploria representative, hotel check-in, welcome drink, and leisure time.
  • Full-day sightseeing in Kathmandu covering Pashupatinath Temple, Boudhanath Stupa, Swayambhunath Stupa, and Kathmandu Durbar Square.
  • Scenic drive from Kathmandu to Pokhara with Manakamana Temple darshan by cable car en route.
  • Fly from Pokhara to Jomsom, transfer to hotel, and visit the sacred Muktinath Temple.
  • Return flight to Pokhara and full-day sightseeing covering Bindabashini Temple, Gupteshor Cave, Devi’s Fall, Seti River, Fewa Lake, and Peace Pagoda.
  • Drive from Pokhara to Kathmandu with leisure time upon arrival.
  • Final breakfast and assisted airport transfer by Travelxploria representative for departure.

• Arrival in Kathmandu with airport pickup by Travelxploria representative, hotel transfer, welcome drink, and leisure time.
  • Full-day guided sightseeing in Kathmandu covering Pashupatinath Temple, Bouddhanath Stupa, Swayambhunath Stupa (Monkey Temple), and Kathmandu Durbar Square.
  • Drive from Kathmandu to Pokhara via Manakamana Temple darshan by cable car, followed by hotel check-in and free time.
  • Explore Pokhara’s top attractions including Bindabashini Temple, Gupteshor Cave, Devi’s Fall, Seti River, Fewa Lake, and Peace Pagoda during a full-day tour.
  • Return drive from Pokhara to Kathmandu with hotel drop-off and free time to relax or explore.
  • Departure from Kathmandu with hotel-to-airport transfer assisted by Travelxploria representative.

overview:
Best India to Nepal Tour Packages – Discover the Roof of the World

Embark on a soul-stirring journey with the best India to Nepal tour packages, where ancient culture meets majestic Himalayan scenery. Whether you're planning a spiritual retreat, romantic escape, or adrenaline-fueled adventure, Travelxploria—your trusted Best International Tour Operator and best tours and travel agency in India—offers seamless and unforgettable experiences tailored for Indian travelers. All packages comply with guidelines from the Nepal Tourism Board, ensuring authentic and safe experiences for Indian visitors.

Why Visit Nepal from India?

Close Proximity and Easy Accessibility for Indian Travelers
One of the main reasons Indian tourists choose Nepal is its close proximity and convenient travel access. Whether you’re looking for a Nepal tour package from Delhi, Nepal tour packages from Kolkata, or even Hyderabad to Nepal tour packages, Travelxploria, recognized among the best international travel agents in Kolkata, ensures simple documentation, border assistance, and well-connected transfers via road or flight. Indian citizens can enter Nepal using either a valid passport or voter ID card—no visa required. Carry physical copies of IDs for hotel check-ins.

Majestic Himalayan Views and Cultural Heritage
From the stunning Annapurna range to the sacred stupas of Kathmandu, Nepal is a treasure trove of natural wonders and ancient heritage. Every traveler is captivated by serene temples, vibrant festivals, and the iconic sight of Everest piercing the clouds. For photography lovers, sunrise at Sarangkot in Pokhara or Nagarkot near Kathmandu offers some of the most Instagram-worthy views of the Himalayas.

Ideal for Pilgrimage, Adventure, and Leisure Travel
Nepal offers something for everyone. Pilgrims can visit Lumbini—the birthplace of Lord Buddha—while thrill-seekers can opt for paragliding in Pokhara or jungle safaris in Chitwan. Families and honeymooners will find serenity in peaceful hill stations and curated cultural walks. That’s why our India to Nepal adventure tour packages under budget and India to Nepal honeymoon tour packages at affordable price are among our most popular offerings.

Top India to Nepal Tour Packages

5 Days Nepal Tour Package from India – Kathmandu and Pokhara Highlights
This well-crafted package includes the best of Kathmandu and Pokhara. Stroll through the grandeur of Durbar Square, visit the Swayambhunath “Monkey Temple,” and enjoy a serene boat ride on Phewa Lake with Machapuchare reflecting in the waters. A perfect short getaway for first-timers or those seeking a mix of culture and nature. The journey between Kathmandu and Pokhara can be done by road (6–8 hours) or flight (30 minutes).

India to Nepal Honeymoon Tour Packages
Our India to Nepal honeymoon tour packages at affordable price offer romantic experiences—from candle-lit riverside dinners in Chitwan to stargazing in a private campsite near the Himalayas. Add-ons include spa treatments, sunrise mountain views in Nagarkot, and private cultural tours. Packages also include optional sunrise yoga, meditation sessions, and premium suites with Himalayan views—ideal for those searching honeymoon packages from Kolkata or other Indian cities.

Budget-Friendly Nepal Tour Packages for Indian Families
Explore affordable India to Nepal tour packages that are crafted with families in mind. Visit child-friendly attractions in Pokhara, enjoy a jungle safari in Chitwan, and learn about peace and meditation in Lumbini. These experiences create unforgettable family memories—all without straining your budget. For kids and elderly travelers, all itineraries include rest breaks and vehicle support for longer walks.

Customized Nepal Tour Itineraries from Major Indian Cities
We offer flexible itineraries whether you are looking for Nepal tour packages from Mumbai, Nepal tour package from Delhi, Nepal tour packages from Kolkata, or Hyderabad to Nepal tour packages. All our packages can be tailored based on your group size, interest, and duration. You can choose pick-up options from the India-Nepal border (Sunauli, Raxaul, Panitanki) or major Indian airports with connecting flights. Travelxploria, your best tour and travel company in India, ensures convenience every step of the way.

Popular Destinations Covered in Nepal Tour Packages

Kathmandu – Temples, Durbar Squares, and Heritage Walks
Explore the heart of Nepal at Kathmandu’s UNESCO-listed sites. From the architectural marvels of Durbar Square to the sacred Boudhanath stupa and the spiritual energy of Swayambhunath, every street corner echoes Nepal’s rich legacy. Evening aarti at Pashupatinath temple is a deeply moving experience—recommended for couples and culture lovers.

Pokhara – Lakes, Caves, and Mountain Views
Pokhara offers tranquil lakeside vibes and Himalayan adventure. Take a traditional boat across Phewa Lake, explore the Gupteshwor Cave, and hike to the World Peace Pagoda. It’s the ultimate destination for both relaxation and thrill. Paragliding, zip-lining, and cycling trails are available with certified guides. We recommend advance booking during peak season (Oct–Nov).

Lumbini – Birthplace of Lord Buddha
Walk the peaceful monastic zones of Lumbini where international temples celebrate Buddhist traditions from around the world. Meditation sessions and historical tours make this site a spiritual highlight of any Nepal itinerary. Guided walking tours are available with certified monks who offer meditation guidance in English and Hindi.

Chitwan National Park – Wildlife Safaris and Nature Trails
Embark on a wild escape with Travelxploria’s guided safaris in Chitwan. Spot one-horned rhinos, Bengal tigers, and vibrant birdlife through jeep safaris, canoe rides, and jungle walks. We recommend avoiding elephant-back rides in favor of ethical tourism options like guided jeep safaris and eco-lodges.

What’s Included in the Best India to Nepal Tour Packages?

Hotel Accommodation and Daily Breakfast
Stay in handpicked 3 to 4-star hotels with authentic Nepali charm. Daily breakfast is included with options to add lunch and dinner as per your preference. Luxury upgrades and heritage stays are available in Kathmandu and Pokhara on request.

Transfers from India-Nepal Border or Airport
Our packages include hassle-free transfers—whether you’re flying in or crossing overland from India. We serve all major entry points including Gorakhpur, Siliguri, and Sunauli. All vehicles are private, air-conditioned, and sanitized as per safety standards. Book confidently with the best travel agency for international travel.

Sightseeing Tours and Entrance Fees
Enjoy curated sightseeing with professional guides and included entry to key heritage sites like Patan Durbar Square, Swayambhunath, and Phewa Lake. Our guides are fluent in English and Hindi, and offer insights into history, architecture, and mythology.

Optional Add-ons: Paragliding, Trekking, and Cultural Shows
Enhance your trip with personalized add-ons such as Annapurna treks, paragliding experiences in Pokhara, or traditional dance performances in Kathmandu. We recommend packing trekking shoes, sunscreen, and a light jacket year-round due to elevation-based weather shifts.

Best Time to Visit Nepal from India

Spring (March to May) – Clear Views and Ideal Weather
Spring offers blooming rhododendrons, pleasant trekking weather, and clear Himalayan views. It’s one of the best seasons for honeymooners and families. Light jackets and sun protection are essential. Advance hotel bookings are recommended in Pokhara.

Autumn (September to November) – Festival Season and Trekking
Autumn brings major Nepali festivals like Dashain and Tihar, along with excellent trekking conditions. The crisp air and festive spirit make it ideal for cultural and nature-based travel. Expect high demand—book flights and permits in advance.

Seasonal Travel Tips for Budget and Comfort
Off-season travel (June–August or December–February) means lower prices and fewer tourists. However, it’s wise to check weather updates and pack accordingly. Our affordable India to Nepal tour packages are especially popular during these periods. Monsoon months may affect road travel; winter requires thermal wear for higher elevations.

Frequently Asked Questions About India to Nepal Tour Packages

Do Indian citizens need a passport or visa to enter Nepal?
No. Indian citizens can enter Nepal with a valid voter ID or passport. No visa is required. However, carrying proper ID is essential for hotel check-ins and domestic flights. Aadhar card is not accepted for cross-border travel.

What is the ideal duration for a Nepal tour from India?
A 5 to 7-day trip is perfect for covering major destinations like Kathmandu, Pokhara, and Chitwan. Longer itineraries are ideal for including treks or spiritual retreats in Lumbini. Custom itineraries are available for weekend getaways or extended 10–12 day holidays.

Can I customize my Nepal tour package to include trekking or adventure?
Yes. We offer India to Nepal adventure tour packages under budget that include guided treks, rafting, paragliding, and wildlife safaris. These experiences can be added to standard packages based on your interests. All treks are organized with licensed guides and proper permits.

Are there India to Nepal honeymoon tour packages at affordable price?
Absolutely. Our India to Nepal honeymoon tour packages at affordable price combine luxury, privacy, and romance with great value. Packages include mountain-view suites, private transfers, and romantic cultural experiences. Popular upgrades include spa sessions and Nagarkot sunrise breakfasts.

Are there affordable India to Nepal tour packages for families?
Yes, we specialize in affordable India to Nepal tour packages for families with children. These include age-appropriate sightseeing, safe transport, and comfortable accommodations across family-friendly destinations. Family discounts and multi-room bookings available on request.

Do you offer India to Nepal group or adventure tour packages under budget?
We do! Our India to Nepal adventure tour packages under budget are ideal for groups looking to trek, raft, or explore the wild side of Nepal. We offer discounts for group bookings and customizable routes. Travelers should carry a basic first-aid kit, reusable water bottle, and sturdy footwear.

How to Book the Best India to Nepal Tour Packages

Trusted Indian and Nepalese Travel Agencies
Travelxploria, a best tour and travel company, partners with top-rated tour operators in India and Nepal to deliver a seamless, end-to-end experience. From Delhi to Kathmandu, our network ensures trust and quality service. We are accredited by major travel associations and maintain 24/7 support during your tour.

Online Booking Platforms Offering Cross-Border Packages
You can book our best India to Nepal tour packages through our official website or authorized online platforms. All packages include secure payment options and real-time availability. Seasonal discounts, group offers, and last-minute deals are available—check our promotions page.
​
Travel Documents, Currency, and Health Guidelines
Indian travelers must carry a valid voter ID or passport. The local currency is Nepalese Rupee (NPR), which is widely accepted. We recommend carrying basic medicines, checking for altitude-related concerns, and ensuring mobile connectivity for safety. Local SIM cards (NCELL or NTC) are easily available at the airport with passport ID. Credit cards are accepted in major cities; carry cash in rural areas.
